hero.subtitle: Specialist in authentic kalei works for interior and exterior for 10 years. Active throughout Belgium and internationally. A dedicated team of two craftsmen for a personal approach.

features.title: The art of kalei.
features.subtitle: An ancient technique with modern benefits. The perfect balance between aesthetics and functionality.

items.title: Breathable protection
items.desc: Kalei gives an authentic look and lets walls breathe, preventing moisture problems.

items.title: Mineral pigments
items.desc: We mix our colors ourselves with mineral pigments for a unique, natural appearance.

items.title: Hydrophobic finish
items.desc: Optional water-repellent treatment for extra protection against moisture and dirt.

about.title: 10 years of Craftsmanship.
about.subtitle: Craftsmanship & Passion
about.description: We work with a dedicated team of two craftsmen. This allows us to personally follow up on every project and guarantee a careful and high-quality execution from start to finish. Our passion lies in restoring the authentic appearance of your home, both in Belgium and abroad.
about.personalDesc: Because we work with a dedicated team of two, you always have the same point of contact. From the first measurement to the last brushstroke.
about.pigmentsDesc: No standard colors from a pot. We mix our kalei ourselves with mineral pigments for a result that perfectly matches the light of your home.
about.protectionDesc: A facade must not only be beautiful, but also protected. Our hydrofuge treatment ensures that your kalei is resistant to weather and wind for years.

process.title: Transparent from start to finish.
process.subtitle: Method
process.desc: We believe in clear communication and tight planning. This way you always know where you stand.

steps.title: Measurement
steps.desc: We come on-site for a precise analysis of the facade.

steps.title: Advice
steps.desc: Together we choose the right technique and color for your home.

steps.title: Execution
steps.desc: Our craftsmen apply the kalei with an eye for every detail.

steps.title: Delivery
steps.desc: A thorough check-up guarantees a perfect result.

quote.title: Ready for a new look?
quote.subtitle: Start your request here. It only takes 2 minutes and is completely non-binding.
quote.question1: What type of project is it?
quote.name: Name
quote.successDesc: We have received your details. We will contact you within 48 hours for a site visit.

projects.title: Our Realizations.
projects.subtitle: Craftsmanship in focus. Discover our recent projects.
projects.challengeDesc: Every project begins with a thorough analysis of the substrate. For this project, the focus was on restoring the authentic texture while providing modern, durable protection.
projects.resultDesc: By using our self-mixed mineral pigments, we achieved a color depth that changes with the light throughout the day.

footer.desc: Specialist in authentic facade renovation and kalei works with a high-quality finish for 10 years.

chatbot.title: Digital Assistant
chatbot.subtitle: I'm happy to help you with your questions or quote request.

chatbot.questionSurfaceArea: What is the estimated surface area in m²?

chatbot.questionContact: Almost done! What are your contact details?
chatbot.questionGeneral: Feel free to ask your question. I will forward it to our team.
